titleStmt.title: SII 22.170: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 170. (A.R. No. 170 of 1906) SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT, TIRUKKŌYILŪR TALUK, ELVĀNĀŚŪR. GRĀMĀRDHANĀTHA TEMPLE—IN THE SAME PLACE. PAR. RĀJARĀJADĒVA (II)—6th YEAR (A.D. 1151-52)

summary.p: The inscription begins with introduction Pūmaruviya Tirumādum etc. This records the construction of the main hall (tirumāḷigai) in the temple of Ūrbāgaṅkoṇḍaruḷiya-Mahādēvar by (the chief) Āḷappiṟandāṉ Mōgaṉ alias Rājarājakāḍavarāyaṉ Nāludikkum-veṉṟāṉ of Kūḍal.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . pūmaruviya tirumātum puvimātum jayamātum nāmaruviya kalaimātum pukaḻmātum nayantupulka Arumaṟai vitineṟiyaṉaittun=taḻaippa varumuṟai Urimai maṇi muṭi cūṭit tiṅkaḷ veṇkuṭait ticaikkaḷuṟeṭṭun=taṅku tanikkūṭa
n=tānena viḷaṅkak karuṅkalip paṭṭiyaic ceṅkol turappa poruṅkatirāḻi puvi vaḷarntuṭanvara villavariraṭṭar minavar ciṅkaṇar pallavar nutaliyar pāttivar paṇiya Eṇṇaruṅ kaṟpakamaṇṇakam puṇarntu cempoṉ virasiṅhāsanattup puvanamuḻutuṭaiyāḷo
ṭum viṟṟirun=taruḷiya kopparakecari paṟmarāna tiripuvanac cakravarttikaḷ śrīrājarājadevaṟku yāṇṭu Āṟāvatu milāṭāṉa jananātavaḷanāṭṭu pānūṟkūṟṟattu brahmadeya miṟaiyānaraiyūrāna śrīcoḻakeraḷac caturvetimaṅkalattu Ūrpākaṅkoṇ ṭaruḷiya
mahaādevar koyilil tirumāḷikai ceyvittāṉ kūṭal Āḷappiṟan=tāṉ mokanāna Irājarājak kāṭavarāyaṉ nālutikkum veṉṟāṉ Itu panmāheśvara rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 22.170 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
